## ISSUES FIXED

### Security Fixes

| # | Agent | Issue | Severity | Status | Commit |
|---|-------|-------|----------|--------|--------|
| 1 | Dev | XSS vulnerability | CRITICAL | FIXED | `fix(security): Add XSS protection with HTML escaping` |
| 2 | CTO | CORS wildcard allowed | HIGH | FIXED | `fix(security): Restrict CORS to known origins` |
| 3 | CTO | Redis without password | HIGH | FIXED | `fix(security): Add Redis password requirement` |

### Infrastructure Fixes

| # | Agent | Issue | Severity | Status | Commit |
|---|-------|-------|----------|--------|--------|
| 4 | CTO | Mongoose outdated | MEDIUM | FIXED | `fix(deps): Upgrade mongoose to ^8.8.3` |
| 5 | CTO | Missing health check path | MEDIUM | FIXED | `fix: Add healthCheckPath to render.yaml` |

### Code Quality Fixes

| # | Agent | Issue | Severity | Status | Evidence |
|---|-------|-------|----------|--------|----------|
| 6 | Dev | bcrypt auth | CRITICAL | FIXED | auth.service.ts with bcrypt.compare() |
| 7 | Dev | Input validation | HIGH | FIXED | class-validator decorators added |

## MERGE INSTRUCTIONS

```bash
# 1. Ensure on fix/health-check branch
git checkout fix/health-check

# 2. Pull latest changes
git pull origin fix/health-check

# 3. Switch to main
git checkout main

# 4. Pull latest main
git pull origin main

# 5. Merge fix/health-check
git merge fix/health-check

# 6. Push to origin
git push origin main
```

### Conflict Resolution

If conflicts occur:
1. Resolve conflicts manually
2. Run `npm test` to verify
3. Commit resolved files
4. Push
